topics: Introduction - Environmental Legislation and Regulation - Water Quality Standards
Sources and Classification of Wastewater - Types of Water Pollutants and Their Effects
Wastewater Sampling, Preservation and Analysis - Physical and Chemical Characteristics of Wastewater - Determination of Solids and Organic Matter
Dissolved Oxygen (Oxygen Sag Curve), Biochemical Oxygen Demand, Chemical Oxygen Demand

Pretreatment and Primary Treatment of Wastewater (Brief Overview - Diagram, Principle and Working of Equipment Only, Design Not Needed) - Screening, Grit Removal, Oil Removal and Equalization, Neutralization, Coagulation, Flocculation and Sedimentation, Clarifiers and Clariflocculation
Sludge Treatment and Disposal - Sludge Thickening, Sludge Conditioning, Sludge Dewatering, Sludge Digestion and Composting (Brief Overview)
Solid Waste Treatment - Sources and Classification, Collection and Disposal Methods, Open Dumping, Sanitary Landfill, Incineration, Composting
Hazardous Waste - Types of Hazardous Waste, Health Effects, Treatment and Disposal Methods
Noise Pollution - Effects of Noise on People, Noise Control Methods
Sampling and Analysis of Air Pollutants
Effects of Air Pollution - Global Warming and Ozone Depletion
Meteorological Phenomena on Air Quality - Lapse Rates, Pressure, Wind, Moisture and Dispersion

Air Pollution Control Methods and Equipment (Brief Overview - Diagram, Principle and Working of Equipment Only, Design Not Needed) - Control Devices for Particulate Contaminants: Gravitational Settling, Centrifugal Collectors, Wet Collectors, Fabric Filters and Electrostatic Precipitators (ESP)
Control Devices for Gaseous Contaminants: Adsorption, Absorption, Condensation, Combustion, Automobile Emission Control

Suggestion on Project Topics - Project I: Collect Sample from Any Polluted Water Source or Effluent from Nearby Industry (Food Processing, Metal Polishing, Pulp and Paper, etc.), Analyze the Physical, Chemical and Biological Characteristics and Suggest a Treatment Process with Required Primary, Secondary and Tertiary Equipment to Treat the Effluent According to the Disposable Standards Specified by Legislation, Use Modelling and Simulation Software to Design the Process; Project II: Collect Air Sample from Flue Gas, Urban Polluted Area, Analyze Air Quality Index and Design Suitable Air Quality Monitoring/Control Equipment; Project III: Collect Any Solid Waste Sample (e-Waste, Hazardous Waste), Analyze the Characteristics and Suggest/Design Treatment Process/Equipment
